name: archive-room-phase-8

tested.summary: Implementation completed and self-tested. Covered schedule controls, event-only skip behavior, archive-manager-first automatic governance, stale replacement, human boundary pending queue, context exclusion of stale content, Phase4/6/7 regressions, real Phase8 fixture data, and Chrome DevTools CDP UI validation with localization check.

done.summary: 用户确认“我暂时没问题了，这个需求可以验收了”。验收范围包含 Phase8 维护频率配置、计划/事件巡检展示、档案管理员优先治理、stale/source comparison/pending 展示、产物浏览、滚动位置保持、按钮对齐和档案室顶部留白调整。

notes: Child requirement created for Archive Room Phase 8 after Phase 7 acceptance.
